outline.headline: AI Presentation Systems Overview
outline.message: Introduce the architecture and capabilities of AI presentation systems.

outline.headline: Key Architecture Components
outline.message: AI systems use structured data ingestion, retrieval, and multi-step content planning.

outline.headline: Template-Driven Layout Strategies
outline.message: Discuss template-first and rule-based auto-layout strategies for slide generation.

outline.headline: Comparison of Layout Strategies
outline.message: Compare template-first, rule-based, and free-form layout strategies.

outline.headline: Data Ingestion Modalities
outline.message: Explore various data ingestion methods like document upload and structured data connectors.

outline.headline: Intermediate Representation in AI Systems
outline.message: Explain the use of SlideSpec JSON for layout and rendering.

outline.headline: Standards and Compliance
outline.message: Discuss the importance of standards-compliant OOXML in PPTX generation.

outline.headline: Summary and Recommendations
outline.message: Summarize key points and provide recommendations for AI presentation systems.
